content.title: Memory leak — App crashes under load
content.description: The Node.js application crashes every 30 minutes under load. The server becomes unresponsive. Users see 502 errors. The OOM killer kicks in.
content.incident: Out Of Memory. The process was killed by the kernel. RAM at 99% before crash.
tasks: Monitor memory usage in real time
Identify the process consuming the most RAM
Find the leak source (heap dump or logs)
hints: top or htop to see RAM usage in real time
free -h to see total available RAM
Check for arrays or caches that grow without bounds

feedback.success: Memory stable. No crashes in the last 10 load simulations.
feedback.partial: Leak reduced but not eliminated. Memory still growing.
feedback.fail: The process is still crashing. The leak is active.

content.success_message: INCIDENT RESOLVED — Memory leak identified and fixed — +150 XP
